title: Spec 1 ‚Äî PEGIN technical stack (Chia + POC)
text:
> **Rule:** Tech team and business team work independently. They share interfaces via smart contracts (fee structures) and DIG store schemas.

### Business Implementation Stack

| Component                  | Technology                                                                                                   | Team     |
| -------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------- |
| **PEGIN Governance Token** | Rue CAT contract + `slot-machine`                                                                            | Business |
| **Credential NFTs**        | Rue NFT contract with royalty puzzle                                                                         | Shared   |
| **Issuer Registration**    | Rue contract (minting fee)                                                                                   | Shared   |
| **DIG Peer Revenue**       | `chia-dig-node` Docker deployment                                                                            | Business |
| **Token Distribution**     | `reward-distributor-clsp`                                                                                    | Business |
| **Analytics Dashboard**    | TypeScript + Recharts                                                                                        | Business |
| **Naming System**          | [Yakuhito/slot-machine](https://github.com/Yakuhito/slot-machine) + [XCHandles](https://docs.xchandles.com/) | Shared   |

### Revenue Streams (Technical Implementation)

| Stream                | How It Works Technically                                                    |
| --------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **DIG Storage Fees**  | Run DIG peer ‚Üí enterprises replicate data to my node ‚Üí DIG pays me          |
| **Indexer Fees**      | Run `chia-block-listener` + custom indexer ‚Üí dApps query ‚Üí charge per query |
| **NFT Royalties**     | Rue royalty puzzle in credential NFT ‚Üí 2-5% on trades                       |
| **Issuer Fees**       | Rue contract charges 0.1-1 XCH to mint issuer NFT                           |
| **Custody Referrals** | Integrate Fireblocks/banks API ‚Üí referral fee (business contract, not code) |

### Team Boundary

```
TECH TEAM                           BUSINESS TEAM
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pegin-core (Rust)               ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Token economics model
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pegin-protocols (Rust)          ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Enterprise sales
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pegin-contracts (Rue)           ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Partnership/referral deals
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ @pegin/sdk (TypeScript)         ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Compliance/legal
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pegin-dashboard (React)         ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Marketing/community
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ DIG integration                 ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Pricing strategy
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ WASM bridge                     ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Analytics dashboard

SHARED INTERFACES
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Rue smart contracts (define fee logic)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ DIG store schema (define data model)
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ NFT metadata standard (define credential format)
```

---

title: Spec 1 ‚Äî PEGIN technical stack (Chia + POC)
text:
### Phase 0: Setup (Week 1-2)

```
‚ñ° Rust workspace: pegin-core, pegin-protocols, pegin-contracts
‚ñ° TypeScript workspace: @pegin/sdk, pegin-dashboard
‚ñ° Install Rue CLI (cargo install rue-cli)
‚ñ° Set up rue-vscode extension
‚ñ° Deploy Chia testnet node
‚ñ° Deploy DIG testnet peer (chia-dig-node Docker)
‚ñ° Study Sage Wallet architecture (xch-dev/sage)
‚ñ° Study chia-wallet-sdk DID/NFT examples (xch-dev/docs)
```

### Phase 1: "Login with PEGIN" POC (Week 3-8)

```
CORE (Rust):
‚ñ° DID creation via chia-wallet-sdk DidInfo
‚ñ° WebAuthn registration/login via passkey-rs
‚ñ° Link passkey credential to Chia DID
‚ñ° JWT token issuance after login
‚ñ° Audit log writes to DIG store
‚ñ° Axum HTTP server with WebAuthn endpoints

CONTRACTS (Rue):
‚ñ° pegin_did.rue ‚Äî DID registration contract
‚ñ° pegin_credential.rue ‚Äî Credential NFT contract
‚ñ° Compile with rue-cli, test with chia-sdk-test

SDK (TypeScript):
‚ñ° @pegin/sdk ‚Äî "Login with PEGIN" button component
‚ñ° @simplewebauthn/browser integration
‚ñ° JWT session management
‚ñ° Demo website showing login flow
```

### Phase 2: Enterprise Protocols (Week 9-14)

```
‚ñ° OIDC Provider implementation (openidconnect crate)
‚ñ° SAML 2.0 IdP implementation (samael crate)
‚ñ° OAuth 2.0 authorization server
‚ñ° SCIM 2.0 server (bulk provisioning)
‚ñ° Merkle tree bulk user provisioning via chia-wallet-sdk MerkleTree
‚ñ° Azure AD SAML federation test
‚ñ° Email recovery via DIG network
‚ñ° Multi-sig recovery via Chia Signer
```

### Phase 3: Enterprise Features (Week 15-20)

```
‚ñ° LDAP gateway (translate LDAP queries to DIG lookups)
‚ñ° Group management (group NFTs)
‚ñ° RBAC (role-based credential attributes)
‚ñ° Conditional access (Rue smart contract conditions)
‚ñ° Compliance audit reports from DIG logs
‚ñ° Tauri v2 desktop app (like Sage)
‚ñ° Security audit of Rue contracts
```

### Phase 4: Business & Token (Week 21-24)

```
‚ñ° PEGIN CAT token (Rue contract + slot-machine)
‚ñ° Credential NFT royalties (Rue royalty puzzle)
‚ñ° Issuer registration fees
‚ñ° DIG peer with storage fee collection
‚ñ° Token distribution (reward-distributor-clsp)
‚ñ° Naming system (slot-machine: alice.pegin)
‚ñ° Launch testnet beta
```

---

title: Spec 1 ‚Äî PEGIN technical stack (Chia + POC)
text:
```
PEGIN DSSO ‚Äî Quick Reference

POC Feature:  Passkey Login anchored to Chia DID
Languages:    Rust (core) + Rue (contracts) + TypeScript (SDK/UI)
Blockchain:   Chia (chia-wallet-sdk, chia_rs, clvm_rs)
Contracts:    Rue language (xch-dev/rue) ‚Üí CLVM bytecode
Data:         DIG Network (dig-l2-storage, DataLayer-Driver)
Auth:         passkey-rs (WebAuthn) ‚Üí OIDC ‚Üí SAML ‚Üí SCIM ‚Üí LDAP
App Pattern:  Tauri v2 (Rust + React), same as Sage Wallet
Recovery:     Email (DIG) + Multi-sig (Chia Signer)
Token:        PEGIN CAT (Rue) + NFT credentials
Revenue:      DIG peer fees + NFT royalties + custody referrals
Naming:       slot-machine (alice.pegin)
POC:          8 weeks, 2-3 devs
Full v1.0:    24 weeks, 4-7 people
```

---

_Built with üêß by the PEGIN team. Waddle in, authenticated out._
